claim_bullets.bullet_text: JavaScript Boolean values true and false are the fundamental truth types. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-108)
The && and || operators are binary infix operators performing logical AND and OR. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-108)
Passing non-Boolean expressions to logical operators yields results based on truthiness, not strict Boolean logic. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-108)

source_record_text: This chapter discusses Boolean values, truthiness, and control flow operators in JavaScript.
